REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS UNCERTAIN AS TO WHETHER BREACH OF CONTRACT OR CONTRACTUAL INDEMNITY IS ASSERTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A 10-DAY LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE SEPARATELY, IN GOOD FAITH, EACH ELEMENT OF A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND/OR A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRACTUAL INDEMNITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
CROSS DEFENDANT ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. The third cause of action is uncertain as to whether breach of contract or contractual indemnity is asserted. Plaintiff shall have a 10-day leave to amend to allege separately, in good faith, each element of a cause of action for breach of contract and/or a cause of action for contractual indemnity. Prevailing party to prepare and submit an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
